basic.q: When collecting blood specimens, blood culture tubes must be drawn last to prevent contamination by additives from other tubes. (O/X)
To inhibit glycolysis and ensure accurate blood glucose measurement, a tube containing sodium citrate must be used. (O/X)
The specific type and chemical properties of an amino acid constituting a protein are determined by the differences in the R group attached to the central carbon. (O/X)
AST and ALT commonly require pyridoxal 5-phosphate as a coenzyme when catalyzing transamination reactions. (O/X)
The pH of an aqueous solution is mathematically defined by the equation pH = -log[H+]. (O/X)
In a limit of linearity curve, the dynamic range strictly includes the linear range and refers to the entire response interval measurable by the instrument. (O/X)

scenario.q: Which enzyme functions optimally at a low pH and is found in high concentrations in the prostate gland, making it historically significant as a biomarker for prostate cancer prior to the widespread use of PSA?
Which condition is most associated with increased LD3?
